summary: An exceptionally high‑quality recording hailed as one of the best ever captured, delivering crystal‑clear sound of a stellar Dead performance.
review: Reviewers rave that this tape is among the finest Grateful Dead recordings available, praising its superb clarity and overall sonic excellence. While no specific musical moments are cited, the enthusiastic five‑star rating implies both an outstanding show and a top‑tier capture.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review is present, but it gives a perfect 5‑star score and extols the recording as "one of the best ever," indicating exceptional quality despite lack of detailed musical commentary.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer describes it as one of the best recordings ever, implying crisp, clear, and highly professional sound capture (likely a high‑end Schoeps mic setup).
